problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to and, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
